name: Okta Application Lifecycle Tampering (30 days)
description: Detects successful Okta application update, deactivate, or delete events that can disrupt access or weaken controls.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_app_id, COALESCE(l.target_app_label, l.target_id, l.target_app_id) AS app_name, l.event_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users actor ON actor.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) IN ('application.lifecycle.update', 'application.lifecycle.deactivate', 'application.lifecycle.delete') AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Confirm application lifecycle changes are approved, restore unauthorized deactivations/deletions, and investigate suspicious admin activity.
